httpSample.lb: Authenticate with empty username and password

httpSample.responseData:
{"result":null,"targetUrl":null,"success":false,"error":{"code":0,"message":"Your request is not valid!","details":"The following errors were detected during validation.
 - The Password field is required.
 - The UserNameOrEmailAddress field is required.
","validationErrors":[{"message":"The Password field is required.","members":["password"]},{"message":"The UserNameOrEmailAddress field is required.","members":["userNameOrEmailAddress"]}]},"unAuthorizedRequest":false,"__abp":true}
